item.title: So much love in the pup’s eyes
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Instead of the meme, can we the shine light on the Afghan breaker who got disqualified for wearing a "Free Afghan Women" cape?
item.description: https://apnews.com/article/breaking-paris-olympics-afghan-refugee-dsiqualified-ecc788eccf769f145c01a14cf5fc6d98 tldr: During opening round of the women's breaking competition, Talash; an Afghan girl competing for the Refugee team, pulled off her shirt mid dance to reveal a blue cape reading "Free Afghan Women". The crowd, and her opponent, applauded the action, though Talash was eliminated that round simply on scoring. But to no one's surprise, the olympic committee wanted to reinforce what pitiful shits they are so after the fact, they disqualified her for making a "political statement".
item.dc:creator: firehawkcultist

item.dc:creator: Klaxun

item.title: Monday MEME dump to help you with your mental health
item.description:
1. The exact moment he unlock a fetish that would stay for him for the rest of his life
2. Such grace
3. That kid's laugh
4. BUSTA
5. REAL MAN
6. I bet you didn't expect this ending
7. Little guy helping out with the dishes
8
9. Simple way to win
10
11
12. Why are your friends so violent?
13. MANLY MEN
15. Thanks to the two people (Hi, Mom and Dad!) who made it to the end of this dump. When I'm not busy making questionable life choices on the internet, I've been pouring my soul into a little passion project. If you got a kick out of this dump, you're going to love my game: "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)." Think "The Stanley Parable" but with even more chaos and quirky characters such this little nihilist pancake. Can you imagine? A first-person game mixed with humor? Anyway, please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="Linkify-element">https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ It would mean the world to me and my brother if you checked out the game and gave it a wishlist. It won't disappoint. I promise. Just, whatever you do, don't press the big red button!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: the harpy's meme library: volume 54 (applauding molecules)
item.description:
Hello and welcome to another meme dump, my imgur friends. The above meme is absolutely correct, I've always tweaked every recipe I've ever made to have more cheese than called for, because they NEVER use enough cheese and cheese is fucking amazing
Otto and me, anxiety thundershirt buddies forever
I have had strangers stab me with needles for hours on end and yet I still absolutely hate answering phones
oh nooo how terrible
Unless it's a typical suburban lawn/golf course. THAT grass is an abomination.
Just remember your brain is an organ just like every other one in your body. Sometimes it can be wonky and need a little help, and that's okay
The internet people like when I do this, does that count as being a productive member of society?
That's me today, as a whole ass adult
Yeah I always wanted to be cool and mysterious. Turns out I'm just a weird goth-flavored clown
I'm already going to hell so I don't feel bad laughing at Titan memes, they get me every single time All right, that's all for this meme dump, my imgur friends. Until next time, don't forget to be awesome!
item.dc:creator: SecretHarpy

item.title: Smol dump of legally stolen memes & things pt 3
item.description:
I'm so awkward.
Only Monday-Friday
And boy do I love a carnival
And that horse has seen some shit.
Cheeseburgers only want one thing.
Something about a pig farm.
That it is.
Cat tax- Turtles
item.dc:creator: WorthlessRaisin

item.title: Um…*gestures vaguely*
item.description: It’s a contract job that has incremental downsizing. I work in quality so I have a job as long as we have a contract (no one else knows how to do my job). But the workload only takes about 20 minutes a day now and 2 more people are leaving. It’s been fun but I have to look out for myself.
item.dc:creator: neospor1n

item.title: On Racism:
item.description: "Trav­el is fatal to prej­u­dice, big­otry and nar­row-mind­ed­ness, and many of our peo­ple need it sore­ly on these accounts. Broad, whole­some, char­i­ta­ble views of men and things can not be acquired by veg­e­tat­ing in one lit­tle cor­ner of the earth all one’s life­time." - Mark Twain Source: Zen Pencils #73 - 'Journey' https://www.zenpencils.com/comic/journey/
item.dc:creator: ruint

item.title: Wrinkly moustache baby
item.description: This is an orphaned walrus pup being rehabilitated at the Alaska Sea life Center. The baby is preparing for a snooze. Shamelessly stolen from Instagram so you don't have to go there
item.dc:creator: Necridos

item.title: Cake Day post
item.description: Everyone should be aware that the foil does not block others from being able to read your mind and steal your thoughts and ideas. That's what they want people to think. In fact the foil amplifies your thoughts so that it's easier to steal them. At least that's what the voices told me.
item.dc:creator: GSH116

item.title: Frieren by Backslash Cosplay!
item.description:
I loved Frieren so much that I had to make this cosplay! Everything is self-patterned and made by me from scratch- even the staff, which I 3D-modeled, printed, and painted myself. It was a ton of work but she's worth it. Chuuu!
Reference.
item.dc:creator: alliekins
